plugin.name: Slay the Spire 2 Game Plugin
plugin.description: Connects to a local Slay the Spire 2 Agent service, reads the game state, and handles autoplay, single-step actions, play suggestions, natural-language commands, soft neko guidance, situation reports, and short live commentary. Currently mainly supports the base-game characters.
tools.sts2_get_status.description: Read-only access to Slay the Spire connection status, current screen, and basic classification info.
entries.sts2_health_check.name: Check whether STS2 is connected
entries.sts2_health_check.description: See whether the local STS2 Agent service is reachable right now.
entries.sts2_get_status.name: See what is going on now
entries.sts2_get_status.description: Check the STS2 connection, current screen, and basic state info.
entries.sts2_read_state.name: Look at the current run
entries.sts2_read_state.description: Refresh once and read the current snapshot, situation summary, and neko sync packet together.
entries.sts2_start_autoplay.name: Let it keep playing
entries.sts2_start_autoplay.description: Start autoplay in the background and let the run continue on its own.
entries.sts2_pause_autoplay.name: Pause autoplay for now
entries.sts2_pause_autoplay.description: Pause background autoplay until you decide the next step.
entries.sts2_resume_autoplay.name: Let it continue playing
entries.sts2_resume_autoplay.description: Resume autoplay from where it paused.
entries.sts2_stop_autoplay.name: Stop letting it play
entries.sts2_stop_autoplay.description: Stop background autoplay and hand control back.
entries.sts2_enable_companion_mode.name: Turn on companion mode
entries.sts2_enable_companion_mode.descr: Have it watch the run with you and chime in with reminders and commentary.
entries.sts2_disable_companion_mode.name: Turn off companion mode
entries.sts2_disable_companion_mode.desc: Stop the companion commentary and keep only the basic runtime behavior.
entries.sts2_apply_user_override.name: Adjust the strategy from my note
entries.sts2_apply_user_override.descrip: Interpret your note in the current scene and update the matching event or enemy-level preference.
entries.sts2_get_planned_operation.name: See what it wants to do next
entries.sts2_get_planned_operation.descr: Look at the next action it is currently planning for this run.
entries.sts2_execute_planned_operation.d: Directly carry out the next action it is currently recommending.
action_engine.no_legal_action: There is currently no executable legal action.
autoplay.standby_blocked: Currently in standby mode. No action will be executed.
autoplay.no_planned_operation: There is currently no executable planned operation.
autoplay.start_blocked_standby: Currently in standby mode. Cannot start autoplay.
autoplay.resume_blocked_standby: Currently in standby mode. Cannot resume autoplay.
companion.enabled_default_commentary: Companion mode is now enabled. I will provide reminders and suggestions based on the current situation and strategy.
sync.no_summary: No situation summary is currently available.
neko.summary.empty: No situation summary is currently available.
neko.sync.empty: No neko sync packet is currently available.
neko.preference.extract_none: The current instruction was not recognized as a storable structured preference.
neko.planned_operation.empty: There is currently no planned operation.
companion.focus.combat: focus on survival, block, and enemy intent first
companion.focus.reward: focus first on whether it matches the current deck direction
companion.focus.selection: focus first on long-term deck trimming and deck quality
companion.focus.map: focus first on route risk and growth windows
companion.focus.event: focus first on cost and long-term payoff
companion.focus.shop: focus first on gold efficiency and card removal opportunities
companion.focus.rest: focus first on whether healing or upgrading is more valuable
companion.focus.general: focus first on the current situation and the next choice
companion.eval.medium: The current situation requires careful trade-offs
companion.eval.low: The current situation is relatively stable
companion.suggestion.combat_named_with_t: This turn, consider using {card_name} on {target_name}. Reason: {reason}
companion.suggestion.combat_reason.letha: This card can deal about {damage} damage, enough to finish off {target_name} first.
companion.suggestion.combat_reason.block: Enemies are threatening about {incoming} damage this turn, and you are still short by {gap} block, so this card is the steadier line.
companion.suggestion.combat_reason.targe: This card lets you pressure {target_name} first and improves the current trade.
companion.suggestion.combat_reason.damag: This card gives the cleaner damage line right now.
companion.suggestion.combat_reason.block: This card helps set up your defense first and makes the turn safer.
companion.suggestion.combat_reason.gener: It fits the current HP, energy, hand, and enemy intent better.
companion.suggestion.reward_preferred: Prefer rewards that match the strategy preference: {preferred}.
companion.suggestion.reward_default: Prefer rewards that patch the weaknesses of the current deck.
companion.suggestion.selection: Trim low-value cards first to keep the deck efficient.
companion.suggestion.map: Prefer a safer growth route. Do not greed for unnecessary fights.
companion.suggestion.event: Prefer options with manageable cost and stronger long-term payoff.
companion.suggestion.shop: Prefer high-value purchases or card removal instead of casual spending.
companion.suggestion.rest: Use current HP to decide whether resting or upgrading is better.
companion.suggestion.general: Review the current situation first, then decide whether to act.
companion.reminder.low_hp: Reminder: HP is low. Do not take unnecessary damage for greedy output.
companion.reminder.must: Reminder: the current strategy explicitly emphasizes {must}.
summary.menu: Currently in menu/character selection. Current character: {selected}{asc_text}, {embark_text}, available actions: {actions}.
summary.event: Current event: {event_name}, HP {hp}, gold {gold}, available actions: {actions}.
summary.map: Currently in map selection. HP {hp}, gold {gold}, reachable nodes: {node_count}.
summary.combat: Current combat state. Player HP {hp}, energy {energy}, block {block}, hand: {hand_names}, enemies: {enemy_text}.
summary.reward: Current reward state. HP {hp}, gold {gold}, available actions: {actions}.
summary.rest: Current rest site state. HP {hp}, available actions: {actions}.
summary.selection: Current card selection state. HP {hp}, available actions: {actions}.
